speaker: Matthew McConaughey
verification_notes: Created 2026-05 when sio-mcconaughey-go-to-zero-2020 was re-sourced here from a misattributed Tim Ferriss episode. The $14.5M rom-com refusal (~2010) and the 'if I couldn't do what I wanted...' stance are documented in McConaughey's memoir Greenlights (Crown/PRH, ISBN 9780593139158, Oct 2020) and widely reported (Penguin Random House book page, IndieWire, ScreenRant, etc.). Official publisher URL verified via web search (2026-05). Text-only source — no embeddable video. SIO excerpt is a faithful paraphrase pending a brief verbatim quote + page citation before approval.
rights_or_usage_notes: Published book. Brief documented quotes for attribution; link to the official publisher page. Do not reproduce extended passages.
